question: Quelles metriques utiliser pour mesurer la productivite et la qualite d'une equipe humain+agent ?

principles.text: Composer DORA 4-keys (Deployment Frequency, Lead Time, Change Failure Rate, MTTR) + SPACE 5-dimensions (Satisfaction, Performance, Activity, Communication, Efficiency) + metrics agent-specific (agent-authored LOC ratio, human-override rate, escalation rate, cost per merged PR). Ne JAMAIS utiliser une metrique seule — Goodhart risk. Eviter les vanity metrics type Copilot acceptance rate ou Cursor tab-accept rate. Le DORA 2025 confirme que 'AI's primary role is as an amplifier' : les AI assistants augmentent l'output individuel (21% more tasks, 98% more PRs merged) mais incrementent aussi review time (+441%) et incidents per PR (+242%) — un composite DORA+SPACE capture ce tradeoff, un single-metric le manque.

sources.name: Forsgren, Storey, Maddila, Zimmermann, Houck, Butler 2021 - The SPACE of Developer Productivity (ACM Queue 19(1))
sources.quote: Satisfaction and well-being, Performance, Activity, Communication and collaboration, Efficiency and flow

sources.name: DORA 2025 Report - State of AI-assisted Software Development
sources.quote: AI's primary role is as an amplifier, magnifying an organization's existing strengths and weaknesses

sources.name: Ziegler et al. 2024 - Measuring GitHub Copilot's Impact on Productivity (CACM)
sources.quote: acceptance rate to be better correlated with reported productivity than more detailed measures of contribution

sources.name: Peng et al. 2023 - Impact of AI on Developer Productivity Copilot RCT (arXiv:2302.06590)
sources.quote: treatment group, with access to the AI pair programmer, completed the task 55.8% faster than the control group

sources.name: ISO/IEC 5338:2023 §6.3.7 Measurement process (sous Technical management processes)

etd_balance.benefices: Visibilite impact AI, decisions fondees, capture tradeoff speed/quality
